titleStmt.title: The Secretary of State to the Chargé in Colombia ( Lockett )

div.head: The Secretary of State to the Chargé in Colombia ( Lockett )
div.p: 1061. From Wiley.Ambassador Wiley was temporarily in the United States. I am informed President Lleras authorized SantamariaCarlos Sanz de Santamaria, Colombian Ambassador in the United States. to continue present agreement temporarily in order to afford time to negotiate contracts for new missions.

Your 1387 Nov 19, 11 a.m.Not printed. Am surprised that Tamayo still (requests that Army officer be Chief of Mission for both Army and Navy. You may recall at our last meeting I carefully explained to him that subject was highly controversial and that under present American legislation and procedure I feared that for some time to come such a request could not receive favorable action. Could you clarify this with Tamayo and have Military Attaché discuss subject with General Solano.Gen. José D. Solano, Colombian Chief of Staff. [Wiley.]
